data.content: The project uses **MSTest 3.8.0** with the newer Microsoft Testing Platform (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport=true`). Tests are categorized — I'll filter for `Integration` only.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run integration tests with category filter

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run integration tests with category filter

data.reasoningText:
The project uses **MSTest** (v3.8.0) with `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk`. The `Directory.Build.props` enables `TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport`, which means it uses the newer Microsoft Testing Platform integration with `dotnet test`.

The tests have categories: "Unit" and "Integration". The user wants to run only the integration tests. With MSTest and the testing platform, I can filter by category using `--filter "TestCategory=Integration"`.

Let me run the tests.

arguments.description: Run integration tests with category filter

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-02f442a38cf24207ae0d3549d67fbe15 && dotnet test --filter \"TestCategory=Integration\" 2>&1", "description": "Run integration tests with category filter", "initial_wait": 60}

toolArgs.description: Run integration tests with category filter
